headline: FedEx Ramps Up Competition With Amazon for Same-Day Delivery. The Stock Rose.
summary: Consumers have an insatiable desire for faster delivery.  FedEx  is creating a solution to make that task a little more manageable.  On Tuesday, FedEx announced the rollout of “FedEx SameDay Local,” a service that will enable time-definite delivery windows across a national network.

raw.headline: FedEx Ramps Up Competition With Amazon for Same-Day Delivery. The Stock Rose.

headline: UPS ADMITS DRIVER BUYOUTS VIOLATE TEAMSTERS CONTRACT IN CENTRAL REGION
summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) notified the International Brotherhood of Teamsters on Tuesday that it was withdrawing its latest driver buyout scheme in Central Region states after nearly 37 local unions filed grievances against the parcel giant for shamelessly violating the UPS Teamsters contract. This action will greatly undermine the company's illegal pursuit of buyouts in other regions under the National Master Agreement.

headline: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
summary: FedEx announced it's partnering with last-mile delivery company OneRail to bring same-day delivery to all of its customers.

raw.headline: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
